sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n585" key="a)gkulo/glwsson" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγκῠλό-γλωσσον</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πάθος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n585.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contraction of the tongue,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.15</biblScope> </bibl> tit., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.29</biblScope> </bibl>; and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγκῠλό-γλωσσος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who suffers from it,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg008:38" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.38</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
